name: Pineapple Cheese Ball
directions: Mix the package of ranch dressing mix with the softened cream cheese until well mixed.
Then add 1/2 can of crushed pineapple, (no juice), the 2 stalks of green onion chopped and the shredded cheese.  Mix well and cool in the fridge for 20 minutes.
Turn out onto a cheese board or platter.  Mound it in the center and shape into a ball with a spoon.
If you like you can cover the ball with sliced almonds, sprinkle with dill weed, parsley or paprika.
Chill completely before serving.

name: Pineapple Nut dip
directions: Add all ingredients together in a medium bowl and mix well.
Chill for 3 hours or overnight.

name: Pineapple Cheese Ball
directions: Combine all ingredients, except for 1 cup of the nuts.
Refrigerate.
When chilled, roll in one cup of nuts.
Serve with crackers.

name: Sweet and Tangy Chip Dip
directions: Cream together creamed cheese and dressing.
Add pineapple to taste.
I like about 2 tablespoons.

name: Pineapple Cheese Dip
directions: Beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
Add the sour cream and the crushed pineapple.
Blend well.
Serve well chilled.
Serve with potato crisps/chippies or savoury biscuits.
NOTE:.
Cook time is chilling time.

name: Pineapple Blue Cheese Dip
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Looks nice served in a hollowed out fresh pineapple.
Serve with potato chips.

name: Sweet Pineapple Cream Fruit Dip
directions: Combine cream cheese, sour cream & sugar substitute in small bowl.
Place pineapple in a fine mesh strainer, & using the back of a spoon, press down firmly to release excess liquid.
Combine drained pineapple with cream cheese mixture, & stir until completely blended.
Serve immediately or cover with plastic wrap & refrigerate until ready to serve. Can be made up to 24 hours in advance.

name: Pineapple Onion Dip
directions: Mix and allow to refridgerate for a few hours (see how easy that was).
